company_context: Cedexis Cedexis is now part of Citrix Reimagine the employee experience by increasing productivity and engagement. Explore Citrix

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Alex and I'm reaching out from DeepData AI. We're a data processing solution that helps companies like yours optimize their data analytics and gain valuable insights. I came across Cedexis, now part of Citrix, and thought our solution could be a great fit. Can you tell me a bit about your current data processing challenges?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Ah, yes. We're always looking for ways to improve our data analytics, but I have to say, we're pretty set with our current providers. What makes DeepData AI unique, and how does it compare to what we're using now?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Well, our AI-powered engine allows for real-time data processing and analysis, giving you a more accurate and up-to-date view of your business. We've also seen significant cost savings for our clients, as our solution is more efficient and scalable than traditional data processing methods. I'd love to set up a demo to show you how it works.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I'm not sure that's necessary. We're in the middle of a major system overhaul, and adding a new data processing solution to the mix might be more complexity than we can handle right now. Plus, our current contracts with other providers are still ongoing, so changing would involve some significant upheaval. What kind of pricing are we talking about?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Our pricing is competitive, starting at $50,000 per year, depending on the scope of the project and the amount of data being processed. We've found that our solution pays for itself through the cost savings and increased efficiency it provides. And I understand your concerns about timing and contracts, but I'd argue that our solution could actually help simplify your data processing and integrate well with your existing systems.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate the pitch, but like I said, we're not in a position to make any big changes right now. We're also exploring some other options, including building out our own data processing capabilities in-house. Could you just send me an email with some more information, and we can revisit this conversation in a few months when our priorities might have shifted?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Absolutely, I can send over some information. But before I do, is there anything specific you'd like me to include, or any particular pain points you'd like me to address in the email?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: No, that's okay. Just a general overview of the product and the pricing will be fine. Thank you for reaching out, Alex, but I think we're going to have to pass on DeepData AI for now.

analysis.raw:
Score: 4
Outcome: Failure
Key_Objection: Timing
Feedback: The seller should have more aggressively addressed the buyer's concerns about timing and complexity by offering a more tailored solution or a phased implementation approach to alleviate the perceived risks. Sentiment: Neutral
